## Required: ClickUp Ticket

- Ticket ID: CU-xxxxxxxx
- Ticket URL: https://app.clickup.com/t/xxxxxxxx

## Optional: Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Optional: Validation

- [ ] I ran relevant local checks
- [ ] I confirmed impacted apps/libs still build

## Optional: Notes

- Any rollout, risk, or follow-up notes
